title: How to Choose a Welder — Full Selection Chart
summary: A single-page visual decision chart guiding users through six sequential criteria — skill level, shielding gas requirement, material type, material thickness, typical applications, and weld cleanliness — to select among four welding processes: Flux-Cored/FCAW, MIG/GMAW, Stick/SMAW, and TIG/GTAW. Includes a sidebar comparing MIG vs. Flux-Cored wire characteristics and a Duty Cycle explanation with a 165A @ 30% example. A callout instructs the user to first identify whether their input voltage is 120 V or 240 V.
